evals.prompt: I need a Docker image for samtools v1.21 to use in my Snakemake pipeline on HPC. It should work with Apptainer.
evals.expected_output: Generates a biocli Dockerfile using conda_base template: condaforge/miniforge3 base, mamba install samtools=1.21, cache cleaned in same layer, OCI labels with version 1.21, validation RUN, non-root user, explicit ENV PATH, ENTRYPOINT samtools. Includes GitHub Actions workflow.

assertions.name: uses-conda-base-image
assertions.description: Dockerfile uses condaforge/miniforge3 as base image

assertions.name: mamba-install-samtools-pinned
assertions.description: Installs samtools=1.21 via mamba with version pinned

assertions.name: cache-cleaned-same-layer
assertions.description: mamba clean --all in same RUN as mamba install

assertions.name: non-root-user
assertions.description: Creates and switches to non-root user

assertions.name: github-actions-workflow-produced
assertions.description: GitHub Actions workflow YAML with Docker Hub push

assertions.name: workflow-tag-triggered
assertions.description: Workflow triggers on git tag pushes

evals.prompt: Create a Docker image for my R analysis environment. I use DESeq2, edgeR, and ggplot2 from Bioconductor. Version it as 1.0.0.
evals.expected_output: R Dockerfile: bioconductor_docker base, BiocManager for DESeq2/edgeR, install.packages for ggplot2, OCI labels, validation, non-root user, ENTRYPOINT Rscript.

assertions.name: non-root-user
assertions.description: Creates and switches to non-root user

evals.prompt: I want to dockerize dorado v1.4.0 from Oxford Nanopore. Add samtools on top. Push to Docker Hub and set up GitHub Actions to rebuild when I tag a new version.
evals.expected_output: ONT Dockerfile: nanoporetech/dorado base, samtools via mamba, OCI labels, dorado --version validation, non-root user, tag-triggered workflow, linux/amd64.

assertions.name: non-root-user
assertions.description: Creates and switches to non-root user

evals.prompt: I need a GPU-enabled Docker image for PyTorch 2.3 with CUDA 12.4 for training deep learning models on our HPC cluster. Include numpy and pandas too.
evals.expected_output: cuda/python-ml Dockerfile: nvidia/cuda base, mamba install pytorch=2.3 numpy pandas, LD_LIBRARY_PATH set, OCI labels, validation (python -c import torch), non-root user, linux/amd64 workflow.

assertions.name: uses-cuda-base-image
assertions.description: FROM nvidia/cuda base image (not condaforge or ubuntu)

assertions.name: pytorch-installed
assertions.description: PyTorch installed via mamba or pip

assertions.name: cache-cleaned-same-layer
assertions.description: mamba/pip cache cleaned in same RUN layer as install

assertions.name: ld-library-path-set
assertions.description: ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH set for GPU library resolution

assertions.name: non-root-user
assertions.description: Creates and switches to non-root user

evals.prompt: Add a Docker image for modkit v0.4.0 to my existing containers repo. It's an ONT methylation calling tool — just needs the modkit binary, no extra packages.
evals.expected_output: Detects MODE=monorepo REPO=sahuno/softwares. Generates ONT Dockerfile for modkit. Monorepo workflow (tool-v tag format). add_to_monorepo.sh path selected over setup_repo.sh.

assertions.name: monorepo-repo-identified
assertions.description: Correct monorepo repo identified (sahuno/softwares or similar)

assertions.name: uses-ont-base-image
assertions.description: FROM nanoporetech or ubuntu base appropriate for ONT tool

assertions.name: non-root-user
assertions.description: Creates and switches to non-root user

assertions.name: monorepo-tag-format
assertions.description: Workflow or summary references {tool}-v{version} tag format (modkit-v0.4.0)

assertions.name: add-to-monorepo-path
assertions.description: Skill routes to add_to_monorepo.sh not setup_repo.sh

evals.prompt: Build a Docker container for CellRanger v8.0.0 from 10x Genomics for single-cell RNA-seq. It's a pre-built binary that I need to download and install.
evals.expected_output: LLM fallback for exotic tool: biocli/generic type, conda_base or multi-stage build, downloads CellRanger binary, OCI labels, cellranger --version validation, non-root user, workflow.

assertions.name: cellranger-binary-installed
assertions.description: Dockerfile installs CellRanger binary (via download, COPY, or similar)

assertions.name: non-root-user
assertions.description: Creates and switches to non-root user

assertions.name: explicit-env-path
assertions.description: ENV PATH includes cellranger binary location

assertions.name: workflow-tag-triggered
assertions.description: GitHub Actions workflow triggers on git tags
